title: Weekly pay-periods worksheet - Canada.ca
content:
## Weekly pay-periods worksheet
Addendum to: (indicate ROE Serial No.)
Social Insurance Number:
Block 15C - Continued
I am aware that it is an offense to make false entries and hereby certify that all statements on this addendum form are true.
Name of issuer (please print)

### Note to the employee
This addendum should remain attached to the record of employment with the serial number indicated above.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
